commercial_parity_summary.label: Heuristic Commercial Parity Estimate
commercial_parity_summary.disclaimer: 이 평가는 live viewer/readiness 기준의 review parity 추정입니다. native authoring/solver parity 점수는 아닙니다.

dimensions.label: 3D review / inspection
dimensions.note: MIDAS 33 full bridge와 verified preview 11건이 이미 review-grade reading을 받쳐줍니다.

dimensions.label: heterogeneous source recovery
dimensions.note: ramp/fcm/rc_house는 verified까지 올라왔고, beam만 아직 마지막 승격 후보로 남아 있습니다 (3 candidate).

dimensions.label: audit / explainability
dimensions.note: AI overlay, evidence gallery, mismatch trace, provenance surface는 상용 review tooling보다 강한 편입니다.

topology_recovery_summary.label: Topology Recovery Ladder
topology_recovery_summary.disclaimer: 이 ladder는 live viewer 기준의 review/exactness tier입니다. native authoring topology parity를 직접 보장하지는 않습니다.

tiers.label: Full Geometry Bridge
tiers.note: 상용 review 툴에 가장 가까운 기준선입니다. MIDAS 33처럼 dense member reading과 before/after 비교가 바로 됩니다.

tiers.label: External Geometry Bridge
tiers.note: 원본 binary exact topology는 아니지만, 외부 geometry bridge가 이미 붙어 있어서 구조 윤곽과 부재 밀도는 상용 review surface에 가깝습니다.

tiers.label: Viewer-Ready Verified Preview
tiers.note: viewer에서 baseline-only review와 lineage trace를 안정적으로 읽을 수 있는 단계입니다. 다만 full authoring topology까지는 아닙니다.

tiers.label: Exact Recovered Topology Candidate
tiers.note: exact recovered topology 신호는 보이지만, 마지막 verified gate가 아직 남아 있는 상태입니다.

tiers.label: Payload / Topology-Grounded Preview
tiers.note: member-add 또는 payload-local topology 근거는 있지만, 아직 full verified preview로 부르기 전 단계입니다.

tiers.label: Hint-Guided Preview
tiers.note: 방향성과 silhouette 비교에는 충분하지만, node/member exactness는 아직 약한 단계입니다.

rows.title: opstool_606m_megatall_model-00020
rows.why_now: Only bridged test holdout. Keeps the batch anchored to a directly materializable outrigger-seismic case with downstream optimization evidence already present.

rows.title: opstool_606m_megatall_model-00009
rows.why_now: Best rahmen-wind test holdout in the public benchmark mirror, giving wind coverage and a direct-model holdout without relying on synthetic-only variants.

rows.title: opstool_606m_megatall_model-00019
rows.why_now: Wall-frame wind test holdout with lower residual than 00010 and inclusion in public_benchmark_cases, making it the stronger wall-frame representative.

rows.title: opstool_606m_megatall_model-00027
rows.why_now: Only selected truss representative. It extends topology coverage to all four available classes and shows one of the cleanest top-k fits among truss cases.

rows.title: opstool_606m_megatall_model-00008
rows.why_now: Bridge-ready validation variant. Complements 00020 by giving a non-test outrigger-seismic case for pre-holdout tuning and optimization dry runs.

rows.title: zenodo atwood highrise shm 2025
rows.why_now: It is the strongest local measured high-rise counterweight to the recurring MIDAS building file and already plugs into dynamic time-history, phase-correction, and noise-stress flows.

rows.title: zenodo kw51 railway bridge monitoring 2025
rows.why_now: It widens the benchmark family from instrumented buildings to full-scale railway bridge response and is the clearest local infrastructure-scale measured holdout.

rows.title: usgs nsmp structural arrays
rows.why_now: It is the best cataloged local route for diversifying measured building-response holdouts beyond Atwood by pairing structural and ground channels from an authority source.

rows.title: tpu highrise wind pressure and force
rows.why_now: It is the only local authority wind track with both isolated and interference high-rise cases, directly targeting the raw HFFB mapping diversity gap called out in the diversification catalog.

detailed_geometry_tracks.title: OPSTOOL 606m Detailed Direct Family
detailed_geometry_tracks.detail: 현재 로컬에서 도면/geometry를 가장 상세하게 바로 읽을 수 있는 메가스트럭처 direct family입니다. 이 direct family는 baseline/detailed geometry truth surface이고, optimization compare wording은 별도 synthetic compare track으로 분리합니다.
detailed_geometry_tracks.next_step: 이 family 안에서 non-outrigger topology variant를 더 늘리면 606m family 편향을 가장 빨리 줄일 수 있습니다.

detailed_geometry_tracks.title: OPSTOOL 606m OpenSees-derived Synthetic Compare
detailed_geometry_tracks.detail: optimization compare wording은 이 track에서만 씁니다. opstool 606m lane이 materialize한 benchmark-derived synthetic geometry와 AI overlay를 보여주며, raw OpenSees family/detail compare와는 분리된 surface입니다. patch mix=perimeter_frame=9, beam_section=8, connection_detailing=7 | support=synthetic benchmark overlay
detailed_geometry_tracks.next_step: direct family coverage가 넓어질수록 synthetic compare도 non-outrigger topology 쪽으로 더 정직하게 확장할 수 있습니다. boundary=synthetic benchmark overlay / no release patch delivery

detailed_geometry_tracks.title: OpenSees SCBF Detailed Local Family
detailed_geometry_tracks.detail: 두 OpenSees baseline은 shared frame을 바탕으로 비교하고, shell-beam mix가 ShellMITC4 slab 5개를 추가한 family compare입니다. shell_mix_ready=true | frame_ready=true
detailed_geometry_tracks.next_step: 현재는 family/detail compare까지만 viewer-ready입니다. optimization compare wording은 synthetic track에만 두고, 이 local family는 raw OpenSees detail truth surface로 유지하는 것이 맞습니다.
